executives.name: Leigh Curyer
executives.background: Mr. Curyer has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector. He was previously the CFO of First Uranium Corporation and has held senior positions at Accord Nuclear Resources and Deloitte.

executives.name: Benjamin Salter
executives.background: Mr. Salter is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance within the mining industry.

executives.name: Travis McPherson
executives.background: Mr. McPherson has been with NexGen since 2014 and has been involved in all aspects of the company's development, including corporate strategy and finance.

executives.name: Gillian McCombie
executives.background: Ms. McCombie has over 25 years of experience in human resources and corporate operations, previously holding senior roles at various mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher McFadden
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McFadden is a lawyer with extensive experience in the mining industry, particularly in corporate development and legal affairs. He was previously with Rio Tinto.

board_of_directors.name: Leigh Curyer
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Patricio
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Patricio is the President and CEO of Mega Uranium Ltd. and has over 20 years of experience in the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Trevor Thiele
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Thiele has over 30 years of experience in senior financial roles, including CFO positions in the resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: Warren Gilman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gilman is the Chairman and CEO of Queen's Road Capital Investment Ltd. and has extensive experience in global mining finance.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
